message:
🌸 Looking for a Female Flatmates
Hi girls! 💕

We're are 3 corporate girlies-  looking for a lovely female flatmates to join us in our beautiful 4 BHK home in Ardee City, Sector 52, Gurgaon from July 1

Its a home that feels warm, cozy, and peaceful after a long day. Think lots of natural light, cute corners, a spacious setup, and a home that you'll genuinely look forward to coming back to. ✨

🏡 About the house:

• Semi furnished and beautifully maintained

• Spacious rooms and common areas

• Safe and secure gated community

• Great location with everything nearby(Ardee mall, gym, sports academy at 100 m) 

• Freshly constructed so first move in

• ⁠Modular kitchen with installed stove, microwave and OTG

• ⁠Ambient lighting with touch and sensor control

• ⁠Attached washroom and huge balcony with green grass with each room 

• ⁠AC cum Heater fitted in the room

Rent - 23.5k

Move in - last week of June or 1 July 

We're hoping to find someone who is easy-going, respectful, and looking for a comfortable space to call home. Bonus points if you enjoy the occasional chai, movie night, or random life conversations. 🤍

DM me for location, other details, or to schedule a visit. We'd love to meet you! 🌷

message:
🏡 Female Flatmate Replacement Required

Looking for a female replacement in a spacious, fully furnished 3bhk flat located in a beautiful gated society in Sector 48, Gurugram.

✨ Room Details:
• Very spacious room – you’ll love the space!
• Attached bathroom
• Attached balcony
• Fully furnished
• Rent: ₹19,333 per month 
• Maintenance: ₹7,300 approx per person (quarterly)

🌟 Society Amenities:
• 24×7 gated security
• Gym
• Clubhouse
• Swimming pool
• Basketball court
• ATM
• Convenience store
• Beautiful green surroundings

🛋️ Additional Costs:
• Setup Cost: ₹6,000 (one-time)(includes chair, mirror, blinds and kitchen items)

🥗 Food Preferences:
• Vegetarian preferred (must be comfortable with eggs)
• Non-veg can be ordered from outside

💁‍♀️ Looking For:
A friendly, responsible, and easy-going female flatmate who values cleanliness, personal space, and a positive living environment.

Move-in date: 1st July

message:
Female Flatmate Required – Replacement | Sector 50, Gurgaon

Hi everyone! I’m looking for a female flatmate to take over my room in a spacious 3BHK located in D Block, Mayfield Garden, Sector 50.

✨ Move-in Date: 1st July
✨ No Brokerage

🛏 Room Details:
• Rent: ₹17,700/month
• Unfurnished room with attached washroom & private balcony
• AC & geyser already installed

💸 Monthly Expenses:
• Bed: ₹1,200
• Maid: ₹1,000 (twice a day)
• Sofa: ₹252
• Washing Machine: ₹275
• WiFi: ₹266
• Inverter: ₹266
Ro: 255

💰 One-time Costs:
• Security Deposit: ₹18,500
• Inverter Security: ₹1,000
• Setup Cost: ₹5,000

🏢 Property Highlights:
• 2nd floor in a low-rise society
• 24×7 security guards
• Designated parking available
• No owner interference, no restrictions

👭 Flatmates:
You’ll be sharing with two friendly, easy-going working professionals.

If you’re interested or have any questions, feel free to DM me 😊

message:
Looking for a Female Flatmate 🌸

We have 1 room available in a fully furnished 3BHK. The other two rooms are occupied by working professional girls, and we’re looking for a like-minded, friendly, and responsible female flatmate.

✨ What you’ll get:

* Fully functional washing machine
* Refrigerator & microwave
* Gated society with good security
* No electricity issues
* No water issues
* Peaceful and well-maintained environment
* Excellent connectivity to major locations

💰 Rent: ₹25,000/month (all-inclusive)
🔐 Security Deposit: 1 month’s rent
🛋️ Setup Cost: ₹7,000

If you’re a working professional looking for a comfortable and hassle-free place to call home, feel free to DM for details and pictures.

A good home, good vibes, and great flatmates await! ✨
